name: Hell Is Us (Eclipse perf)
post_apply_message:
Eclipse perf mod applied (or will be, once staged). Recommended Steam Deck settings: 1280x800, TSR 3D resolution 85%, all settings minimum.

Eclipse's tested Deck hardware setup: GE-Proton (10-15 or newer), TDP 18, GPU clock 1800, CPU/GPU undervolt -50 in BIOS, SDWEAK enabled. IMPORTANT: this mod targets a SPECIFIC game build (1.4.22.43941). If Steam updates the game past that, the modded exe may crash — Revert this recipe (restores the original exe from .gfm-orig) and wait for an updated mod. The mod is NOT in git (it contains a modified copyrighted game exe); stage it into your local-payloads folder first — see notes.
notes: Eclipse Steam Deck graphics-optimisation mod. Mod files are NOT committed (modified copyrighted game exe + large paks) — they live in your local-payloads folder off git. To stage: extract the Eclipse .rar, then copy the CONTENTS of its inner 'Hell is Us' folder into <local-payloads>/eclipse-hell-is-us/payload/mod/ so you end up with payload/mod/HellIsUs/Binaries/Win64/HellIsUs-Win64-Shipping.exe. Then Apply copies that over the game dir, backing up replaced files. Source: Eclipse on Nexus (hellisus/mods/35).
